results.title: Alexander Zverev hopes he can be more than just ‘the third guy’ in tennis after run to Wimbledon final
results.description: Despite losing to Jannik Sinner on Centre Court on Sunday, the 29-year-old Zverev thinks he is closer than ever to challenging the top-ranked Italian and his main rival Carlos Alcaraz.

results.title: Kayla Osborne earns her third Evansville Women's City Tournament victory
results.description: Kayla Osborne held off a late charge from the defending champion to earn her third Evansville Women's City golf title.

results.title: Erasmus details timeline for Sacha Feinberg-Mngomezulu's Bok return
results.description: Springboks head coach Rassie Erasmus has provided an update on the timeline for Sacha Fienberg-Mngomezulu's Springbok return.

results.title: Phoebe Bridgers Launches Itch.io Page With An Infinite Runner

results.title: Formula 1 congratulates ‘Friend of F1’ Jannik Sinner after Wimbledon title defence
results.description: Jannik Sinner successfully defended his Wimbledon trophy on Sunday with a four-set victory over Alexander Zverev. Sinner beat Zverev 6-7, 7-6, 6-3, 6-4 on Centre ...

results.title: Rockyview Silvertips play Calgary Shamrocks in lacrosse playoffs
results.description: The Junior B Tier 1 teams played on Saturday evening, July 11, at Genesis Place.
